# Support

For installation, configuration, and usage guidance, start with the [documentation](https://2chevskii.github.io/gly/).

Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/2CHEVSKII/gly/discussions) for questions, troubleshooting help, and ideas that need conversation before becoming a feature request.

Use the issue templates for confirmed bugs, documentation corrections, and focused feature requests. Do not use public issues or discussions for security vulnerabilities; follow the [security policy](SECURITY.md) instead.
